languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

languages.text: "Ты подозрительно молчалив, досточтимый коллега. Неужели моя победа в наших последних дебатах отвадила твое желание продолжать наши в высшей степени стимулирующие прения?"
"You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"
languages.original_text: "Ты подозрительно молчалив, досточтимый коллега. Неужели моя победа в наших последних дебатах отвадила твое желание продолжать наши в высшей степени стимулирующие прения?"

traits.locale_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"
"You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"
"You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

languages.text: «Guarda un silencio sospechoso, estimado colega. ¿No será que mi victoria en nuestro último debate le ha arrebatado el deseo de continuar con nuestros diálogos tan estimulantes?».
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: «Guarda un silencio sospechoso, estimado colega. ¿No será que mi victoria en nuestro último debate le ha arrebatado el deseo de continuar con nuestros diálogos tan estimulantes?».

languages.text: 「ずいぶんと黙り込んでいますね、尊敬する同僚。まさか、先の議論での私の勝利が、この上なく刺激的な対話を続けようというあなたの意欲を、削いでしまったわけではありますまい？」
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: 「ずいぶんと黙り込んでいますね、尊敬する同僚。まさか、先の議論での私の勝利が、この上なく刺激的な対話を続けようというあなたの意欲を、削いでしまったわけではありますまい？」

languages.text: “你安静得令人生疑，尊敬的同僚。莫非我在最近那场辩论中取胜的结果，已经耗尽了你继续我们之间那些极富启发性对话的意愿？”
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: “你安静得令人生疑，尊敬的同僚。莫非我在最近那场辩论中取胜的结果，已经耗尽了你继续我们之间那些极富启发性对话的意愿？”

languages.text: "Ihr seid verdächtig schweigsam, geschätzter Kollege. Erzählt mir nicht, mein Sieg in unserer letzten Debatte hat Euch die Lust an der Fortsetzung unserer überaus stimulierenden Dialoge geraubt?"
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid verdächtig schweigsam, geschätzter Kollege. Erzählt mir nicht, mein Sieg in unserer letzten Debatte hat Euch die Lust an der Fortsetzung unserer überaus stimulierenden Dialoge geraubt?"

languages.text: « Votre silence est suspect, honorable collègue. Ne me dites pas que ma victoire lors de notre dernier débat a entamé votre désir de poursuivre nos discussions stimulantes ! »
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre silence est suspect, honorable collègue. Ne me dites pas que ma victoire lors de notre dernier débat a entamé votre désir de poursuivre nos discussions stimulantes ! »

languages.text: "Şüpheli bir şekilde sessizsin saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Son tartışmamızdaki zaferimin, son derece teşvik edici diyaloglarımıza devam etme arzunu tükettiğini söyleme bana."
languages.original_text: "You are suspiciously silent, esteemed colleague. Do not tell me that my victory in our latest debate has sapped your desire to continue our highly stimulating dialogues?"

traits.locale_text: "Şüpheli bir şekilde sessizsin saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Son tartışmamızdaki zaferimin, son derece teşvik edici diyaloglarımıza devam etme arzunu tükettiğini söyleme bana."
